subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! If thou seekest divine good-pleasure, cultivate, both night and day, fellowship and companionship with the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی اگر رضای الهی جوای شب و روز با یاران الهی الفت جو و موانست نما
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
